text_excerpt: Contact | Dr Neil Shastri-Hurst Skip to main content Dr Neil Shastri-Hurst MP for Solihull West & Shirley Main navigation Home About Neil News In Parliament Campaigns Contact Local Help Surveys Dr Neil Shastri-Hurst MP for Solihull West & Shirley Contact Leave this field blank Dr Neil Shastri-Hurst MP 631 Warwick Road, Solihull, B91 1AR 0121 709 0458 [email protected] Follow Neil on Facebook Follow Neil on Twitter/X Follow Neil on Instagram Connect with Neil on LinkedIn Need to get in touch or request a surgery appointment? You're in the right place. This form ensures Neil receives all the information he needs to establish your status as a constituent, and for his team to help you quickly. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . We'll likely reply to you by email, so keep an eye on your spam folder just in case, and thanks for bearing with us as we set up our new offices! The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
